zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Vitré於1093年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷時，他的父親André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré28歲，母親Agnes Mortain40歲。他於大約1119年與Emma de La Guerche在法國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1161年11月22日在他的家鄉享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Vitré于1093年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷时，他的父亲André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré28岁，母亲Agnes Mortain40岁。他于大约1119年与Emma de La Guerche在法国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1161年11月22日在他的家乡享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vitré
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico and Argentina): adaptation of a surname such as Greek   Mitropoulos   and Italian   Mitri  .
Albanian and Romanian: from the personal name Mitre, a short form of Albanian Dhimitër, Romanian Dumitru, from classical Greek Dēmētrios (see Dimitris ).

variants.name: Mitropoulos
meanings: Greek: patronymic from the personal name Mitros + the ending -poulos (from Latin pullus ‘nestling, chick’), which occurs chiefly in the Peloponnese. Compare Metropoulos .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Vitré was born in 1093, in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré, was 28 and his mother, Agnes Mortain, was 40. He married Emma de La Guerche about 1119, in France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 22 November 1161, in his hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Vitré est né en 1093, à Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Agnes Mortain, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Emma de La Guerche environ 1119, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 novembre 1161, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Vitré 1093 in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré 28 und seine Mutter Agnes Mortain 40. Er hat um 1119 in Frankreich Emma de La Guerche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. November 1161 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Vitré è nato il nel 1093 nel Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Mortain, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Emma de La Guerche circa 1119, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 novembre 1161, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Vitréが1093年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインヴィトルeで生まれた時，父André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitréは28歳，母Agnes Mortainは40歳であった。約1119年にフランスでEmma de La Guercheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1161年11月22日に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Vitré(이)가 1093년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 비트e에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Mortain(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1119년 프랑스에서 Emma de La Guerche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1161년 11월 22일 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Vitré nasceu em 1093, em Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Mortain, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma de La Guerche aproximadamente 1119, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de novembro de 1161, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Vitré родился в 1093 г. в местности витрe, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Mortain, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma de La Guerche около 1119 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 22 ноября 1161 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Vitré nació en 1093, en Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Agnes Mortain, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Emma de La Guerche aproximadamente 1119, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de noviembre de 1161, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años.
